mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_apply (user_id, username, type, start_time, end_time, reason, status, create_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{username}, #{type}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM leave_apply WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM leave_apply WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM leave_apply ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_apply SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
